goal: Add a side-effect-free receipt record authority builder that records release-governance approved-action consume execution receipt record authorization from ready receipt record preflight while keeping action consume, receipt recording, merge, external actions, GitHub, packages, workflows, deployment, DB, providers, and writes closed.
scope_out: Do not consume actions, record receipts, merge, create PRs, call GitHub, perform external actions, call providers, call DB, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write files.
claims: Ready release-governance approved-action consume execution receipt record preflight can produce a side-effect-free receipt record authorization artifact.
Receipt record authority id, authorizer, and expiry refs are required.
Receipt recording, merge, and external actions remain false.
assumptions: Actual receipt recording, PR work, and merge require later task locks.
dod: Ready, missing authority id, and blocked preflight cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Action consumption, receipt recording, merge, PR creation, GitHub calls, external actions, DB, package, workflow, deployment, or write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-150 preflighted release-governance approved-action consume execution receipt record without recording it.
